attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID
,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.CONFIRMED_FLAG,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.CUSTOMER_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.DEPOSIT_DATE,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.ISSUER_BANK_BRANCH_ID,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.CUSTOMER_BANK_BRANCH_ID,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.OLD_CUSTOMER_BANK_BRANCH_ID,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.OLD_ISSUER_BANK_BRANCH_ID,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.AX_ACCOUNTED_FLAG,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.CASH_APPLN_OWNER_ID,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.WORK_ITEM_ASSIGNMENT_DATE,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.WORK_ITEM_REVIEW_DATE,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.WORK_ITEM_STATUS_CODE,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.WORK_ITEM_REVIEW_NOTE,

 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.PREV_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.WORK_ITEM_EXCEPTION_REASON,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.AUTOMATCH_SET_ID,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.AUTOAPPLY_FLAG,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.SEQ_TYPE_LAST
,
 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME
,
 CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
,'I' as ACTION_CODE
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL
 WHERE 
ORG_ID NOT IN (SELECT ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CASH_RECEIPT_ID  ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME  DESC)=1
)CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL
WHERE CDC_AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
